title: NoUpgradeNetherite
description: Remove of Necessity or Upgrade In Netherite Craftings in Minecraft Java!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c9e4f45141c4a22d86eb5e79f4963d512787fad.png)

THIS MOD GETS RID OF THE NEED TO USE SMITHING TEMPLATES WHEN CRAFTING NETHERITE TOOLS, BRINGING BACK THE OLD-SCHOOL MECHANIC FROM BEFORE VERSION 1.20. UNFORTUNATELY, ITS ONLY OUT FOR FORGE 1.20.1 AND NEO FORGE 1.21.4 & 1.21.1 RIGHT NOW, BUT ILL BE EXPANDING THE PROJECT TO FABRIC AND OTHER VERSIONS SOON

![Craftings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c48a2d0911b4bcb20ca82ca60284a99fe959e1d.png)

OBS: USE 1 NETHERITE INGOT! THIS PRINT IS INCORRECT!
